title: Extended Jujutsu Config
description: Jujutsu configuration extended with gg (GUI/Web) settings

gg.description: Configuration for the gg Jujutsu GUI

default-mode.description: Choose between the native GUI or the Web-based interface.

log-page-size.description: Number of commits to load per call

large-repo-heuristic.description: Threshold where some query settings default to false for performance.

auto-snapshot.description: Take a snapshot when the window gains focus; slow in large checkouts.

recent-workspaces.description: List of recently opened directories for shell integration.

track-recent-workspaces.description: Whether to update recent-workspaces or system jump lists.

mark-unpushed-bookmarks.description: Visually indicate bookmarks that are local-only or remote-only.

theme-override.description: Override system theme. Leave empty to use OS settings.

default-port.description: Port to bind to in web mode (0 = random).

client-timeout.description: Disconnect clients after this duration of inactivity (e.g., '10m').

launch-browser.description: Open browser automatically when starting web mode.

presets.description: Custom presets for the log pane. 'kebab-case' keys become 'Title Case' entries.
